signals.title: BitGo biedt Europese cryptobedrijven MiCA-compliance ondersteuning voor licentiedeadline
signals.summary: BitGo offers Europe’s crypto firms a MiCA-compliance lifeline as license deadline looms

signals.title: Michael Saylor: Bitcoin heeft geen staking nodig zoals Ethereum
signals.summary: Michael Saylor says Bitcoin does not need staking or inflation, outlining a five-layer “Digital Asset Stack” that generates returns through credit and equity products built around BTC.

signals.title: Tokeniseringsmarkt bereikt 43 miljard dollar ondanks institutionele groei
signals.summary: Tokenized financial assets have surged 37% in six months as institutions expand blockchain adoption and the market broadens beyond funds and private credit, according to Token Terminal.

signals.title: Amerikaanse senatoren dringen aan op staatsbetrokkenheid in GENIUS Act stablecoin-proces
signals.summary: U.S. senators urge Treasury not to leave states out of GENIUS Act stablecoin process

signals.title: Binance zet EU-activiteiten voort en stemt af op MiCA-regelgeving
signals.summary: Binance says it remains committed to its operations in the European Union and will continue serving EU customers,…

signals.title: Squid integreert Ripple's RLUSD-stablecoin voor cross-chain transacties
signals.summary: Cross-chain platform Squid has integrated Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin, allowing users to swap into and out of RLUSD across chains and assets.

signals.title: State Street brengt geldmarktfonds voor stablecoin-reserves uit
signals.summary: The launch comes amid growing competition among financial institutions to manage assets backing dollar-pegged stablecoins.

signals.title: Ripple investeert in Flutterwave voor betaalproviders in Afrika
signals.summary: Ripple invests in Flutterwave, pushing its stablecoin and XRP Ledger into payments across Africa
